bio.name: Aka
bio.title: Web Developer & UI/UX Designer
bio.shortDescription: Passionate developer creating elegant solutions with modern technologies
bio.longDescription: I'm a passionate web developer from West Sumatra, Indonesia with expertise in creating beautiful and functional websites. I specialize in JavaScript frameworks like React and Next.js, and always strive to create the best user experience possible.
bio.experience: 3+ years of professional web development experience

projects.name: Modern Portfolio Website
projects.description: A sophisticated portfolio website built with Next.js, TailwindCSS, and Framer Motion featuring smooth animations and a premium feel.

projects.name: E-Commerce Dashboard
projects.description: A comprehensive admin dashboard for e-commerce stores with real-time analytics, inventory management, and order processing.

projects.name: Weather App
projects.description: A beautiful weather application that shows current and forecast weather data with sleek visualizations and location-based services.

projects.name: Task Management App
projects.description: A productivity application for managing tasks, projects, and deadlines with collaboration features and progress tracking.

friends.name: Sarah Johnson
friends.description: A talented designer with a keen eye for detail and user experience. We've collaborated on multiple projects together.

friends.name: Michael Chen
friends.description: A brilliant developer who specializes in scalable backend solutions and clean frontend code. A great teammate and problem-solver.

friends.name: Emma Williams
friends.description: An exceptional product manager who bridges the gap between business needs and technical implementation. Great communicator and strategist.

friends.name: David Kim
friends.description: A database expert and algorithm wizard. Always delivers robust and optimized solutions for complex problems.

updates.title: Portfolio Website Launch
updates.description: Excited to announce the launch of my new portfolio website built with Next.js and TailwindCSS. Check it out and let me know what you think!

updates.title: New Role at TechCorp
updates.description: I've joined TechCorp as a Senior Front-end Developer! Looking forward to creating amazing web experiences with an incredible team.

updates.title: React Conference Speaker
updates.description: Honored to be selected as a speaker at the upcoming React Conference. My talk will focus on optimizing performance in large React applications.

updates.title: Open Source Contribution
updates.description: My pull request to improve accessibility in a popular React component library was merged! Proud to contribute to making the web more inclusive.
